issues.description: unmap_channel_page doc comment (address_space.rs:409) says 'Used for rollback when handle_send partially maps channel pages' but is now also used by sys_channel_create. The comment should be updated to reflect both call sites.

HandleError::TableFull is returned when map_channel_page fails, but the failure is an address space exhaustion, not a handle table issue. This is a pre-existing naming issue (not introduced by this fix) but worth noting for future cleanup.

summary: Clean, minimal fix that correctly applies the established unmap_channel_page rollback pattern from handle_send (d9a32a2) to sys_channel_create. Kernel diff is 10 lines — captures va_a from first map_channel_page and calls unmap_channel_page(va_a) on the second map failure path before closing handles. 5 well-structured tests model both buggy and fixed behavior using a SimAddressSpace, following the same dual-model pattern as handle_send_rollback.rs. All 965 tests pass, kernel builds clean.
